Brand.name: Ohana Events
Brand.tagline: Snack carts, fresh aguas, baby shower animations, and parties to remember.

WhatsApp.prefill: Hi! I’m interested in event services. Date, location, and budget:

Home.heroSubtitle: Snack carts, fruit treats, fresh aguas, fun characters — plus baby shower animations (baby showers only). We run the station so you can enjoy the party.

snackFruit.title: Fruit snack cart
snackFruit.desc: Fresh, colorful, and perfect for any party.

snackCorn.title: Elote cart
snackCorn.desc: Classic street-style corn with your favorite toppings.

snackChips.title: Chips & candy cart
snackChips.desc: Fun options for kids and adults.

babyShower.title: Baby shower animations
babyShower.desc: Costumed characters and mascots for baby showers — big baby outfits, themed favorites, 360 booth moments, and more (baby shower bookings only).

characters.title: Characters
characters.desc: Surprise guests love a mascot or themed character at birthdays and celebrations.

heroHighlights.servicesBlurb: Snack carts • Baby shower animations • Characters

Home.animationsSectionSubtitle: Live character entertainment — real moments from our events.
Home.animationsIntro: We bring mascots and costumed characters: sweet baby characters for mom-to-be photos, classic duos, fan favorites, and fun extras like a 360 photo setup. Tell us your theme and date on WhatsApp.
Home.gallerySubtitle: Snacks, setups, and party energy — your theme can be custom.
Home.footerCTA: Ready to plan? Message us on WhatsApp.
Home.ownerDashboardHint: Owner-only (will ask you to sign in)

OwnerGuide.title: How online contracts work
OwnerGuide.intro: Follow these steps in order. The client never needs an account — only the link you send.
OwnerGuide.step1Body: Fill in event details, services, and totals. Save as often as you like.
OwnerGuide.step2Body: When you are ready for the $25 deposit, publish the contract and copy the link to your client (text, email, or WhatsApp).
OwnerGuide.step3Body: They read the terms, choose how they will pay the deposit (Cash, Cash App, or Zelle), and sign. Payment happens outside this website.
OwnerGuide.step4Body: After they sign, open the contract here, add your signature to complete it, then download the PDF for your records.
OwnerGuide.step2Short: Publish and send the client link.
OwnerGuide.step3Short: Client signs and arranges deposit payment (off-site).
OwnerGuide.step4Short: You countersign here, then download the PDF.

Contract.listSubtitle: Draft → send link → client signs → you countersign. Status labels below show where each contract is in that flow.
Contract.dbSetupBody: Neon is connected, but the contracts table is not created yet. In Neon: SQL Editor → paste the full contents of the file migrations/postgres/0001_contracts.sql from your project → Run. Then reload this page.
Contract.dbErrorGeneric: Could not load contracts. Confirm DATABASE_URL is set on Vercel, redeploy after env changes, and that Neon is running.
Contract.depositNonRefundableShort: $25 deposit — non-refundable if the event is cancelled.
Contract.ownerSignHint: The client has signed. Sign below to complete the agreement.
Contract.publicSubtitle: Please review the details below. When you are ready, choose how you will send the deposit and sign.
Contract.depositClauseBody: A deposit of $25.00 is required. This deposit is not refundable if you cancel the event. Payment is made directly to Ohana Events using the method you select below (Cash, Cash App, or Zelle) — not through this website.
Contract.depositAckCheckbox: I understand the $25 deposit is non-refundable if I cancel.
Contract.paymentMethodTitle: How will you pay the deposit?
Contract.paymentMethodHint: You will complete payment outside this website using the option you choose.
Contract.waitingOwner: Thank you — your signature was received.
Contract.waitingOwnerHint: Ohana Events will countersign shortly. You can close this page.
Contract.completedThanks: This agreement is complete. You can download a PDF copy below.
Contract.mustAgreeDeposit: Please confirm you understand the deposit is non-refundable if you cancel.
Contract.signatureRequired: Please sign in the signature box.
